subcodes.first_line: O ye divine friends! His honour Aqa Mulla Muhammad-'Ali, upon whom rest the glory of God, hath attained the Holy Land in a state of utmost supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی جناب آقا ملا محمد علی علیه بهاء الله در کمال ابتهال بارض مقدس
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @love and unity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation
